mapper.insert: insert into "h_alarm" (alarm_id, receiver, sender, message, link, create_at, category, "read") values (default, #{receiver}, #{sender, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{message}, #{link, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), #{category}, 'N')
mapper.select: select alarm_id as alarmId, receiver, sender, message, link, create_at as createAt, read_at as readAt, category, "read" from "h_alarm" where receiver = #{receiver} order by alarm_id desc
mapper.update: update "h_alarm" set "read" = 'Y', read_at = now() where receiver = #{receiver} and "read" = 'N'
